body: Parent closure is an aggregation of six closed child beads with durable implementation commits: governed handler APIs d7a20e94; GraphQL/MCP migration 6b1a1a86; server/gRPC migration 4cd8d599; raw SPI sealing 01ce26a6; AxonBuilder/package boundary 4dc2f731; final PostgreSQL-qualified integration report 22b563a5. Final report: .ddx/executions/20260711T165759-a2e97b5a/final-governed-raw-adapter-boundary-gates.md. It records 2,244 passed tests, 43 PostgreSQL conformance assertions, compile-fail and governed-route counts, metadata true, clippy -D warnings, and fmt. Valid explicit reviews are stored under .ddx/reviews/2026-07-10-axon-gap-closure/ for the reviewed children.
source: closed child DAG and final gate report
summary: All six child beads closed; final raw adapter boundary gate passed PostgreSQL qualification
